title: Show live procedure feedback performance on scorecards
description:
Update ProcedureTask cards to match EvaluationTask grid layout and show the current optimizer feedback accuracy evaluation live across score procedure lists and the procedures dashboard.

Behavior:
- Procedure cards show timestamp, duration, notes, status, task stages, and feedback accuracy bar in a consistent order.
- Score-scoped and version-scoped procedure lists hydrate the current optimizer feedback evaluation and update it via realtime evaluation subscriptions.
- Procedures dashboard uses the same presentational ProcedureTask data when optimizer artifacts are available.

Feature: Live procedure feedback performance
Scenario: A procedure has a current optimizer feedback evaluation
Given a procedure card is shown for an optimizer run
When the run manifest identifies the current accepted feedback evaluation
Then the card shows that evaluation's accuracy progress bar and updates it when the evaluation changes.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting implementation on feature/zero-schema-optimizer-workbench. Plan: add shared optimizer feedback evaluation summary helpers, update ProcedureTask grid layout, wire score procedure lists and procedures dashboard to hydrate and realtime-update the current feedback evaluation.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented ProcedureTask grid layout changes, shared current-feedback-evaluation summary helpers, score procedure list realtime evaluation-summary updates, and procedures dashboard manifest/evaluation hydration. Focused Jest tests and dashboard typecheck pass.
